description: Product Description Christmas Hat Made of friendly to your baby's skin cotton fabric. This super cute hat is suitable for both -boys and girls. Festive Bib This adorable bib features a convenient snap fastener, cute festive design and gentle cotton fabric. Adorable Socks Novelty cotton rich socks are perfect to complete your little baby festive outfit. When it comes to spreading Xmas cheer, our baby gift sets are the perfect gear! Stylish patterns and festive theme designs makes this 3 piece sets an excellent gift for your loved little ones on this Christmas! Give them as a seasonal or special occasion gift and delight anyone who gets them as a surprise! Hat & Bib made from 100% Cotton, the Socks are made from gentle Cotton Blend Made from a cotton ( hat and bib) and cotton rich blend (socks), getting a set of these novelty Xmas accessories is a real adorable gift to any little baby. Cotton is kind and gentle to every type of skin, non-irritating to even those with allergies and sensitivity. The high quality, breathable cotton fabric. can absorb and wick moisture to keep feet dry, and thermoregulates, maintaining a steady, comfortable temperature to keep wearers comfy and cosy. With the plant’s natural antibacterial properties, cotton rich socks are able to help your feet stay fresher by resisting odour-causing bacteria. HAT & BIB - Made from: 100% Cotton SOCKS - Made from: 75% Cotton 23% Polyester 2% Elastane
